title: Pin runtime automation plan after merge
goal: After the runtime automation baseline plan is merged to main, bind the initiative current_plan to the merged commit and raw document SHA-256.

metadata.safety_boundary: post-merge registry pinning only; no runtime automation authority

acceptance.assertion: The initiative current_plan commit points to a commit that is reachable from main after PR merge.
The initiative current_plan document_sha256 matches the raw bytes of the merged plan document.
The task changes only registry plan pinning and introduces no scheduler, observer, dispatch, merge or completion behavior.
